name: CX157
description: CX157,3-fluoro-7-(2,2,2,-trifluoroethoxy)phenoxathiin-10,10-dioxide, is a reversible, selective inhibitor of MAO-A designed to have improved oral bioavailability and reduced clearance compared to previous MAO-A inhibitors of this class.
mechanismOfAction: This drug increases the levels of three vital neurotransmitters that affect mood and anxiety: serotonin, norepinephrine and dopamine.
